calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Sell Or Hold Real Property And For Instructions As To The Management Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Conrad Donner (Trustee) in Propria Persona.

The Court will allow that the Post Street property be retained/maintained and that the Wells Fargo Bank funds/investments be moved out of Wells Fargo rather than computing the waiver. The Court granted the petition for instructions with regard to the above (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
